arts.ttl: Everton saw two bids for player rejected in January – Club want big sale as Premier League hovers
arts.sum: Everton were interested in a move for Freiburg midfielder Merlin Röhl in the January transfer window. That’s according to Sport BILD, who report that Everton made two bids for the 22-year-old but were turned away by the German side.
